tasks.task: Initialize a new Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS using `create-next-app`.
Develop core React components (Navbar, Hero, About, Projects, Contact) for the portfolio layout.
Populate components with personal project details, professional experience, and contact information.
Integrate a functional contact form using Formspree or Resend for email submissions.
Commit all code changes and push the entire codebase to a new public repository on GitHub.
Deploy the Next.js application from the GitHub repository to Vercel.
Configure and link a custom domain to the deployed Vercel application.
